tools.name: charter_baseline_diff
tools.authority_boundary: Returns local baseline drift facts; it does not make release decisions.

tools.name: charter_baseline_get
tools.authority_boundary: Returns one local immutable baseline snapshot.

tools.name: charter_baseline_list
tools.authority_boundary: Lists local immutable baselines without creating or changing snapshots.

tools.name: charter_project_context_get
tools.authority_boundary: Reports local Charter project context and read-only capability metadata.

tools.name: charter_requirement_dossier_get
tools.authority_boundary: Returns the local computed dossier; live peer calls are not made in P0.

tools.name: charter_requirement_get
tools.authority_boundary: Returns one local requirement record; active drafts remain separate from approved truth.

tools.name: charter_requirement_search
tools.authority_boundary: Returns local requirement records without changing authority state.

tools.name: charter_trace_link_list
tools.authority_boundary: Returns local trace links with state, authority, and freshness preserved.

tools.name: charter_verification_status_get
tools.authority_boundary: Returns derived local verification status and evidence freshness.

tools.name: charter_verification_status_list
tools.authority_boundary: Lists local unverified or stale verification statuses without recording evidence.
